overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in wizard robes exploring Gothic castle interiors. The character moves through stone corridors and enters classrooms filled with wooden tables, display cases with artifacts, and a potions room with a large fireplace, all lit by warm torchlight and chandeliers.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow Gothic stone corridor with vaulted ceilings supported by large pillars. Wall torches cast warm flickering light on the stone floor tiles as the character approaches a large wooden door at the end of the passage.

character slows slightly while observing the room and continues toward the center

agents.ego_description: entering the large hall and walking down the central aisle between rows of wooden tables, looking around the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious hall with high Gothic vaulted ceilings, walking between rows of wooden tables. House banners hang from above and an iron chandelier provides warm lighting. The room has a museum-like atmosphere with glass display cases visible along the walls.

segments.scene_description: The character explores the left side of the hall, approaching glass display cases containing an ancient coffin. The wall features mounted exhibits including a wand collection and an antique bicycle wheel. Bookshelves line the wall as the character examines the artifacts closely.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through back of classroom and connecting stone corridor

events.description: character turns away from displays and walks toward the back exit of the room
character exits the classroom through a wooden door into a narrow stone corridor
character passes large stacked cauldrons lining the right side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the classroom, exiting through a wooden door, and continuing through a corridor lined with stacked cauldrons

entered.detail: large copper cauldrons stacked on top of each other along the corridor wall
wooden door at the end of the corridor leading to the potions room

segments.scene_description: The character moves to the back of the classroom and exits through a wooden door into a narrow stone corridor. The passage is lined with large stacked copper cauldrons on the right side as the character walks toward another wooden door leading to the next room.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a warm potions classroom dominated by a massive stone fireplace with a roaring fire. Large iron cauldrons sit on pedestals, and wooden tables are arranged with ingredients and equipment. The room has a cozy, workshop-like atmosphere with shelves of jars and hanging copper pots.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow Gothic corridor through a vast museum-like hall and into a cozy potions workshop. It begins by moving through a vaulted stone passage lit by flickering wall torches before passing through a large wooden door into a spacious hall. As the camera glides between rows of wooden tables under hanging banners and an iron chandelier, the scene shifts toward the perimeter to examine glass display cases containing an ancient coffin, a wand collection, and an antique bicycle wheel. The movement then leads out through a rear exit into another stone corridor lined with stacked copper cauldrons, which serves as a transition toward a final wooden door. Finally, the camera enters a warm potions classroom dominated by a massive roaring fireplace, where iron cauldrons and shelves of jars create a dense, workshop-like atmosphere.
